case_title: YVETTE YOUNGER VS. THE CALIFORNIA ASSOCIATION FOR HEALTH EDUCATION AN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNGER, YVETTE AS TO DEFENDANT THE CALIFORNIA ASSOCIATION FOR HEALTH EDUCATION AN D DIGNITY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA CAHEED INFANT DAYCARE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
